_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Connelly Early shuts out Rays 2-0, hands Tampa Bay first shutout of season
items.snark: Kid threw seven scoreless, made the Rays look like they forgot how runs work, entire staff finally showed up to the park.

items.headline: Early dominates with best start of career, Sox shut out Rays 2-0
items.snark: Seven innings, eight strikeouts, loaded the bases and escaped like Houdini, this is why we draft guys who can actually pitch.

items.headline: What bullpen moves are incoming for Red Sox with Slaten set to return soon
items.snark: Slaten threw his final rehab inning, Bennett got demoted, Anderson recalled, bullpen shuffles like a JV roster on cuts day.

items.headline: What bullpen moves are incoming for the Red Sox with Slaten returning?
items.snark: Weissert might get DFAed after blowing another lead, couldn't happen to a nicer ERA north of five.

items.headline: Franklin Arias shoots up 34 spots on Baseball America top 100 prospect list
items.snark: Shortstop jumped 34 spots to number 16, prospect nerds adjusting their spreadsheets and their cargo shorts simultaneously.

items.headline: NFL schedule release set for Thursday May 14 at 8pm, full 2026 slate incoming
items.snark: League finally announcing schedule May 14, Pats will leak three primetime games on social before then like clockwork.

items.headline: Patriots sign five 2026 draft picks, four still unsigned including Lomu and Jacas
items.snark: Five draft picks signed Friday, first-rounder Lomu still negotiating like he's got leverage, just sign the slotted deal buddy.

items.headline: Patriots add 12 undrafted free agents, jersey numbers announced for UDFA class
items.snark: Twelve UDFAs signed, jersey numbers assigned, practice squad spots being handed out like participation trophies at training camp.
